title: refund — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two class-level attributes for listener discovery. `AsRefundListener` subscribes to refund lifecycle events (requested / approval_required / approved / rejected / processing / succeeded / failed / cancelled / provider_error / provider_reconciled). `AsRefundLineListener` subscribes to refund_line events (created). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events. No property-level attributes: the two owned rows use ordinary Eloquent + spatie/laravel-data class attributes shipped by foundation.

attributes.name: AsRefundListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to refund lifecycle events (RefundRequested / RefundApprovalRequired / RefundApproved / RefundRejected / RefundProcessing / RefundSucceeded / RefundFailed / RefundCancelled / RefundNotifiedProvider / RefundProviderError / RefundProviderReconciled / RefundClawbackReferral / RefundClawbackCoupon).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every Refund* event.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (refunds or refunds-critical).

attributes.name: AsRefundLineListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to refund_line lifecycle events (RefundLineCreated). Refund lines are immutable at creation — no update / delete events fire.
